hero.description: Spoiler alert: Stop using tools and start designing them. A path for professionals who want to own their time. Create impact. Generate abundance. Live with purpose.

roadmap.subheading: 4 progressive phases that take you from User to Industry Reference.
roadmap.duration_note: * Estimated duration: 6–12 months. The route is personalized to your goals.

n0.title: Strategic
n0.description: FREE. We evaluate your digital, professional and methodological maturity to design a personalized roadmap. No generic diagnoses.
n0.feat1: Map of time losses and friction points
n0.evolution_text: From "I don't know where to start" to total clarity on your current situation, priorities and next steps.

n1.description: Strategic 1:1 Coaching. We design your roadmap toward digital, professional and strategic sovereignty. 18 hours of personalized accompaniment.
n1.evolution_text: From operational reactivity to deliberate strategy. Clear direction without losing time.

n2.title: Office Suite with
n2.description: Office Bootcamp. Master your office ecosystem with AI: Microsoft 365 (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) or Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, Slides). 18 hrs (+2 leveling).
n2.feat1: Automatic drafting of emails and documents
n2.feat2: Reports, dashboards and presentations with AI
n2.evolution_text: From manual tasks to 5–10 hours saved per week. Less friction, more creativity.

n3.title: Commercial Management with
n3.description: Commercial Bootcamp. Prospecting, negotiation and closing powered by AI. 18 hrs (+2 optional leveling).
n3.evolution_text: From unpredictable pipeline to higher close rate and more qualified meetings.

n4.title: Ways of
n4.description: Methodological Bootcamp. Flow design, knowledge management and workflow optimization. 18 hrs (+2 leveling).
n4.evolution_text: From operational chaos to replicable processes. Fewer errors, aligned team.

n5.title: Working
n5.description: Generative AI Bootcamp. Advanced prompting, custom AI assistants, n8n automations. 18 hrs (+2 leveling).
n5.evolution_text: From basic user to generative AI mastery. Your own agentic solutions.

n6.description: Management Bootcamp. Productivity dashboards, AI agent management, real-time metrics. 18 hrs (+2 leveling).
n6.evolution_text: From micromanagement to 360° visibility. Data-driven decisions.

n7.title: Empowerment
n7.description: 48 hrs of Evolution. You become the one who guides others. Trial Module 0 to decide.
n7.evolution_text: From technological dependence to total sovereignty. Independence and professional differentiation.

n8.description: Development Bootcamp. If you can explain it, you can build it. 18 hrs (+2 leveling).
n8.evolution_text: From "I need a developer" to your own software. Ideas → Reality in hours.

n9.description: 48 hrs of Revolution. You go from user to designer of tools, products, services and experiences. Trial Module 0.
n9.evolution_text: From operator to change agent. Recognized authority, multiplied impact.

cta_cotizador.description: The more you commit to your evolution, the greater the support we give you. Customize your route and discover investment options.

final_cta.heading: Ready to begin your (R)Evolution?
final_cta.description: The first step is a conversation. No commitment, no aggressive sales. Just clarity.

hero.subtitle: Google Meet video call. First strategic (R)Evolution conversation — at no cost.

value_card.title: What do we achieve in 60 minutes?
value_card.body: We connect your current pain points and goals with the real possibilities of our service portfolio: bootcamps, digital (R)Evolution pathways, and projects with applied artificial intelligence.
value_card.doc_body: We review the context (challenges, capabilities, urgencies, expectations) and condense it into a Document that maps things out and makes clear where it makes the most sense to invest first and with what type of tailored experience.

footer_note.reschedule_policy: The first reschedule for a valid reason is free; subsequent changes incur a management fee.

modal.title: Logistics & Policies
modal.sla_body: We always offer the first available slot within the next 3 business days.
modal.reschedule_body: You can move the appointment directly from the calendar link.
modal.noshow_body: If you do not attend and do not notify us, the session will be treated as a second consultation when you reconnect. To book again, you must settle the fee of COP 200,000.
